title: Synthetic Data Generator Use Cases in Datilio
summary: Datilio's synthetic data generator creates realistic stand-ins for demos, training, and privacy-safe tests.

content.summary: Datilio's synthetic data generator creates realistic stand-ins for demos, training, and privacy-safe tests.

body.text: Real data is too sensitive for screenshots; synthetic data mirrors schema without risk. Sales demos with believable charts, onboarding exercises, filter-rule testing, Talk to Data practice. Generate columns with types and distributions that look real in preview and bar charts.

body.alt: Data visualization on a modern display
body.caption: Data visualization on a modern display. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Sales demos with believable charts, onboarding exercises, filter-rule testing, Talk to Data practice.
Generate columns with types and distributions that look real in preview and bar charts.

items: Mirror production column names for workflow tests.
Never present generated KPIs as real externally.

body.text: Upload synthetic CSV through the same preview-filter-chart path as production.
Refresh generated sets monthly for varied training scenarios.
Datilio synthetic data separates public demo brilliance from production trust.
